text: English is the best subject for me.

Math is the hardest subject.
The science project is the biggest project.
She is the most helpful teacher.
Hi Carolina! Who is the smartest student in your class this year?
Lucas is the smartest, but he is also the most helpful. He helps everyone!
Nice! And which is the best project this term?
The ocean project! It is the biggest and the most useful one. We learn how to protect the sea.
And the most boring subject? For me it is math!
For me too! But English is the best. This is the most exciting school year of all!
Who is the smartest student in your class?
This is the most exciting school year of all.

This is the best school year I have ever had. English is my favorite subject, and my English teacher is the most helpful teacher in the whole school. She always answers our questions and she is the most patient person I know. The biggest project this term is the ocean project in science, and it is also the most useful, because we learn how to protect the sea. For me, math is the hardest subject and the most boring one, but I still try my best. My classmate Lucas is the smartest student in our class, and he is also the most popular, because he helps everyone. The library is the quietest place to study, and the cafeteria is the noisiest. My happiest moment this year was when I got the best grade in the English exam. I think this is the most exciting year of all.

Good afternoon, students. Today is one of the most special days of the year, because it is our class awards day. First, the award for the most hardworking student goes to Carolina. She always studies more than anyone, and her English is the best in the class. Second, the prize for the most useful project goes to the science team for their ocean project. It is the biggest and the most creative project this term. Third, the award for the most helpful classmate goes to Lucas, because he is the friendliest student and he helps everyone. Finally, remember that the best students are not always the smartest ones. The best students are the ones who never give up. Congratulations to everyone, and have the happiest holidays.

Carolina is talking about the best and the worst things at school. First, she says that English is the best and her favorite subject. Then, she explains that her English teacher is the most helpful teacher in the school. After that, she says that math is the hardest and the most boring subject. Finally, she decides that this is the most exciting school year of all.
